en_title: Retailers Are Issuing Console Shortage Warnings Ahead of GTA 6, and Now I'm Worried Scalpers Are Going to Have a Field Day This Christmas
cn_title: 《GTA6》将至，零售商警告主机短缺，黄牛或趁机大赚
subtitle: 先下手为强
opus_summary: 一家大型零售商警告《GTA6》发售前PS5和XBOX Series可能缺货，黄牛或趁圣诞节抬价。全球内存危机推高主机成本，微软再次涨价，索尼或跟进，建议玩家尽早购买。

paragraphs.en: A major retailer has warned there will be console shortages ahead of the launch of GTA 6 in November, sparking concern that scalpers will cash in on demand for PS5 and Xbox Series X and S this Christmas.
paragraphs.cn: 一家大型零售商警告称，在《GTA6》11月发售前将出现主机短缺，引发外界担忧黄牛可能利用圣诞节期间对PS5和XBOX Series主机的需求大赚一笔。

paragraphs.en: GTA 6 is due out on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X and S only, which means that if you must have a current generation console from either Sony or Microsoft to play the game. Given Rockstar’s hotly anticipated open world adventure is expected to be the biggest entertainment launch of all time, consumer interest in buying a new console is expected to skyrocket.
paragraphs.cn: 《GTA6》仅登陆PS5和XBOX Series，这意味着你必须拥有一台索尼或微软的当代主机才能游玩。考虑到Rockstar备受期待的这款开放世界冒险游戏预计将成为史上规模最大的娱乐产品首发，消费者购买新主机的意愿预计将急剧攀升。

paragraphs.en: That would normally be fantastic news for Sony and Microsoft, but according to The Game Business , retailers are worried they may not be able to capitalize on the demand. According to the site, a “major” games retailer warned there won’t be enough consoles to meet demand over the crucial holiday period.
paragraphs.cn: 这本应是索尼和微软的超级利好，但据The Game Business报道，零售商担心自己可能无法抓住这波需求。该网站称，一家「大型」游戏零售商发出预警，表示在关键的节假日旺季期间将没有足够的主机来满足需求。

paragraphs.en: “We’ve been informed that because of the ongoing issues around hardware component availability, we won’t be getting the units we want ahead of GTA,” the anonymous source said, adding: “Demand will likely outstrip supply during the year end period.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我们已被告知，由于硬件组件供应问题持续存在，我们在《GTA》发售前拿不到期望的主机数量，」这位匿名消息人士表示，并补充道：「年末期间，需求极有可能超过供应。」

paragraphs.en: Both Sony and Microsoft have raised the price of their consoles this year, although the latest price hike from Microsoft doesn’t kick in until August 1. Some are worried Sony may announce yet another PS5 price rise before the year is out (the last price rise, effective from April, sparked a sales collapse in the U.S. ). Currently, the PS5 costs $649.99, the PS5 Digital Edition costs $599.99, and the PS5 Pro costs $899.99.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼和微软今年都已上调过主机价格，不过微软最近一次涨价要到8月1日才会生效。一些人担心索尼可能在年底前再次宣布PS5涨价（上一次涨价自4月起生效，引发美国地区销量暴跌）。目前，PS5售价649.99美元(约合人民币4426元)，PS5数字版售价599.99美元(约合人民币4086元)，PS5 Pro售价899.99美元(约合人民币6129元)。

paragraphs.en: The price rises are the direct result of the "RAMpocalypse," which is an ongoing global memory shortage and price crisis driven by semiconductor manufacturers reallocating their DRAM and NAND production capacity to high-margin hardware for AI data centers.
paragraphs.cn: 这些涨价是「内存危机」（RAMpocalypse）的直接后果——这是一场由于半导体制造商将DRAM和NAND产能重新分配给AI数据中心高利润硬件而引发的持续全球性内存短缺与价格危机。

paragraphs.en: “Last October, we increased Xbox console price by $20-$70 in the U.S.” Microsoft said when it announced Xbox price rises this week. “We hoped another price increase would not be necessary, and we have spent the last several months working with suppliers on options. Unfortunately, console storage and memory prices have increased by more than 2.5x and we expect another doubling by the fall of 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 「去年10月，我们在美国将XBOX主机价格上调了20至70美元(约合人民币136至477元)。」微软本周宣布XBOX涨价时表示，「我们本希望无需再次涨价，过去几个月我们一直与供应商协商解决方案。遗憾的是，主机存储和内存价格已上涨2.5倍以上，我们预计到2027年秋季还将再翻一番。

paragraphs.en: "The entire consumer electronics industry is struggling with the current components crisis, but the effects are particularly hard on consoles. Unlike phones, computers, speakers, and other consumer devices, consoles are typically not sold at a profit, but instead for less than they cost to make.”
paragraphs.cn: 「整个消费电子行业都在应对当前的零部件危机，但对主机的冲击尤其严重。与手机、电脑、音箱等消费设备不同，主机通常不以盈利为目的出售，而是以低于制造成本的价格销售。」

paragraphs.en: Microsoft executives have insisted demand for Xbox consoles exceeds supply, and that it is struggling to improve the situation. What does this mean for you? Well, if you want to play GTA 6 at launch and you need to buy a current-gen console, doing so sooner rather than later is probably wise. As I’ve mentioned, Xbox Series X and S get more expensive from August, and who knows what Sony will do with the price of PS5?
paragraphs.cn: 微软高管坚称，XBOX主机的需求超过供应，公司正在努力改善这一局面。这对你意味着什么？如果你想在《GTA6》发售时立即游玩，又需要入手一台本世代主机，尽早购买或许是明智之举。正如我之前提到的，XBOX Series X和S将从8月起提价，而索尼会对PS5的价格作何调整，谁也说不准。

paragraphs.en: Not only that, but both console offerings may sell out because of the GTA 6 demand, which could open the door to scalpers cashing in. The last thing anyone needs is to be faced with the prospect of paying $1,500 dollars for an Xbox Series X from eBay just to play GTA 6. I dread to think how much scalpers will list a PS5 Pro for this Christmas if it sells out.
paragraphs.cn: 不仅如此，由于《GTA6》的巨大需求，两种主机都可能售罄，这会给黄牛可乘之机。最令人不愿看到的是，为了玩《GTA6》，不得不花1500美元(约合人民币1万元)在eBay上买一台XBOX Series X。我都不敢想象，如果今年圣诞PS5 Pro售罄，黄牛会开出多高的价格。

paragraphs.en: for all the latest, check out our ongoing GTA 6 live report , where we have a steady stream of updates on the game.
paragraphs.cn: 欲了解最新动态，请关注我们持续更新的《GTA6》直播报道，我们会不断带来游戏的相关消息。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在Twitter上找到他@wyp100，或通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系他，保密联系方式为wyp100@proton.me。
